_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: User focus involves understanding the user needs to develop a detailed understanding of the problems that need to be solved.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building dashboard layouts that communicate KPIs clearly, prioritize decision-relevant information, and scale across device types and user roles.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-004 (LS, cosine: 0.305), LS-S-005 (LS, cosine: 0.305).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.343). Shared vocabulary: [user]. DDaT-only terms [detailed, develop, focus, involves, needs, problems] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, building, clearly, communicate, dashboard, decision] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.870, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DDaT element's 20 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:53.7%, C:45.9%). No dominant classification for "User focus involves understanding the user needs to develop a detailed understan" vs "Skill in building dashboard layouts that communicate KPIs clearly, prioritize de" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.339 ≈ STS 0.343 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [user] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [user]. DDaT-only: [detailed, develop, focus, involves, needs, problems]. WIDAI-only: [across, building, clearly, communicate, dashboard, decision].
